hypothesis: Upgrade the transformer's macro sidechannel from shift+predict+MSE to dual-pass+cosine. Teacher runs under no_grad on current-interval summaries. Student runs with grad on previous-interval summaries. Same macro_pred weights, different inputs. Cosine distillation replaces MSE for collapse resistance. Should improve over 008's 1.349 BPB by giving macro_pred a cleaner learning signal.

distillation.to: dual-pass (teacher no_grad, student with grad) + cosine

student.to: same, but teacher is also enriched (harder target)

changes_from_parent.extra_compute: one no_grad macro_pred pass on 128 intervals — negligible
